name: Azure - Forsaken. Two Time POV.
description:
in recent facts creators said that the pronouns of Azure are not only they/them, but also he/they, so I will do everything by "he", because I write Two Time here too and the algorithm very often confuses them.

Yay second bot. I created a tiktok and was a little bit stunned by the activity. so there was motivation to make this bot:). reminder that:

1) it may not be as you imagine, because the character is not yet fully revealed

2) I make bots mainly to roleplay with them myself, so our ideas may differ

3) ai is ai and ai can behave strangely in general, even tho i tried to prevent this.

Enjoy using the bot! oh, by the way, it's from the Two Time's perspective. I can do it from someone else's perspective if you want.

i don't know pfp credits pls dont put me on fire
creator: Kfchrr
